title: cephaelis ceratoloba
intro: Cephaelis ceratoloba, also known as the Ceratoloba or Ceratoloba plant, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. Cephaelis ceratoloba contains ipecac alkaloids, which have been traditionally used for their emetic properties and other medicinal applications. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including relief from nausea and vomiting, and its extracts have been used to treat various gastrointestinal issues. Cephaelis ceratoloba can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures and extracts, and is often used as a medicinal supplement in traditional medicine.
